question: Return the distinct names of all doctors in the 'Cardiology' department, plus the distinct names of all patients who have had any appointment with a doctor in 'Cardiology'.
gold_sql: SELECT doc.name FROM Doctors doc JOIN Departments d ON doc.did = d.did WHERE d.name = 'Cardiology' UNION SELECT p.name FROM Patients p JOIN Appointments a ON p.pid = a.pid JOIN Doctors doc ON a.doc_id = doc.doc_id JOIN Departments d ON doc.did = d.did WHERE d.name = 'Cardiology';
